node.statement: COHERENT-ASC-001: In a finite constant-coordinate coherent refinement system with maps E_nm satisfying E_nn=I, E_ml E_nm=E_nl for n<=m<=l, and E_nm^dagger E_nm=I, the finite ascending observable maps A_nm(O)=E_nm^dagger O E_nm are unital and compose coherently: A_nm(A_ml(O))=A_nl(O). Lean proves this generic finite matrix statement; Julia and WolframScript check exact rational rotation examples. The result formalises only finite matrix coherence of ascending observables, sourced by the `summary.tex` §4.4 inductive system equations ([[def:indlim]] direct-system) and local OAR scaling-map/isometry references; it does not construct a completed direct-limit Hilbert space, continuum field algebra, categorical fine-graining system, or nonconstant growing Hilbert spaces.
